scripts.build: npm --prefix ../../packages/karmolab-ai run build && npm -w packages/discord-bot-common run build && npm -w apps/yawnbot run build && npm -w apps/atkup-bot run build
scripts.build:yawnbot: npm --prefix ../../packages/karmolab-ai run build && npm -w packages/discord-bot-common run build && npm -w apps/yawnbot run build
scripts.build:atkup: npm -w packages/discord-bot-common run build && npm -w apps/atkup-bot run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm -w apps/yawnbot run dev" "npm -w apps/atkup-bot run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -k "npm -w apps/yawnbot run start" "npm -w apps/atkup-bot run start"
scripts.deploy: concurrently -k "npm -w apps/yawnbot run deploy" "npm -w apps/atkup-bot run deploy"
